title: phyllanthus microphyllus var. microphyllus
intro: Phyllanthus microphyllus var. microphyllus, also known as the dwarf phyllanthus, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus microphyllus var. microphyllus include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, which can help prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus microphyllus var. microphyllus include the dried leaves and roots, which can be made into decoctions, infusions, or powders for medicinal use.
